title: Droid factory (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Foundry.png|thumb|right|250px|The Geonosis primary droid foundry]]
'''Droid factory''' may refer to:

==In-universe==
[[Canon]]:
*[[Akiva production plant]], also known as "Myrra droid factory"
*[[Geonosis droid factories]]
**[[Geonosis primary droid foundry]]
**[[Portable droid factory]]
**[[Trippa hive droid factory]]
*[[Mokivj droid factory]]
*[[Techno Union droid factory]]

[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]:
*[[Corellia Droid Factory]]
*[[Factory District droid plant]]
*[[Farquar droid factory]]
*[[Geonosis droid factories/Legends|Geonosis droid factories]]
*[[Geonosis primary droid foundry/Legends|Geonosis primary droid foundry]]
*[[Hidden droid factory]]
*[[HK Manufacturing Plant]]
*[[Hypori droid factory]]
*[[Nal Hutta droid factory]]
*[[Nar Shaddaa droid factory]]
*[[Neimoidian droid factory]]
*[[Olanet droid factory]]
*[[Palitoy Droid Factory]]
*[[Techno Union droid factory]]
*[[Thule droid factory/Legends|Thule droid factory]]

==Out-of-universe==
*The [[1979]] playset produced by [[Kenner Products|Kenner]], featuring [[Monster droid/Legends|Monster droids]]
*The [[2008]] (to present) [[Star Wars: Droid Factory (toy line)|toy line]] produced by [[Hasbro]] and [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]]
*The [[2015]] book [[Star Wars: Droid Factory (book)|''Star Wars: Droid Factory'']]
